title: B.S. in Neuroscience
details: Graduated with General Honors.

title: Research Assistant
details: Helped design and program a MATLAB Psychtoolbox experiment evaluating a behavioral paradigm in healthy, human subjects.
Consented and ran participants through MATLAB attention studies.
Analyzed study data using statistical models in MATLAB and Excel.

title: Nu Rho Psi (Neuroscience Honors Society)
details: Involved in multiple community service events.

title: Mentor – Baltimore Robotics Institute
details: Mentored a competitive robotics team at a Baltimore elementary school in the Highlandtown neighborhood.
Helped the team design, build, and program their robot.
Accompanied the school to competitions and coached them during matches.

title: Patient Representative
org: Johns Hopkins Bayview Medical Center ED
details: Patient advocate tending to patients' non-clinical needs.
Showed visitors to patients' rooms in the Emergency Department.

title: Sunday School Assistant
org: Greek Orthodox Cathedral of the Annunciation
details: Helped teachers with daily lessons and activities, primarily with the third-grade class.
Helped track students to and from church service and the school.

title: President – Orthodox Christian Fellowship
details: Organized faith-based discussions with our priest.
Coordinated rides for students to church each Sunday during college.

title: EMT-B / Crew Chief
details: Volunteer EMT-B responding to 911 calls.
Crew Chief: stocked ambulances, requested additional resources on calls, and managed the crew during duty hours.

title: Data Analyst
details: Collected and analyzed patient engagement data.
Optimized patient engagement workflow.
Worked with administration and IT to implement new patient engagement software.

title: Medical Scribe
details: Scribed for physicians on a biweekly basis across various specialties at an HRSA-designated free clinic.

title: Clinical Research Coordinator
details: Maintained IRB compliance on active clinical studies.
Wrote literature reviews and research papers based on prospective and retrospective clinical studies.
Analyzed and computed statistics on clinical data.
Wrote insurance appeal letters for patients denied coverage for reconstructive surgery.
Assisted with credentialing of physicians in fellowship societies.
Trained a fellow clinical research coordinator.

title: M.S. in Computer Science (Align)
details: MSCS Align program at Khoury College of Computer Sciences.

title: Graduate Teaching Assistant
details: TA for a graduate-level Data Structures, Algorithms & Computer Systems course for CS bridge students.
Hosted biweekly office hours.
Led a weekly recitation.
Graded assignments.

title: Graduate Research Assistant
org: Northeastern SATH Lab (Signal Processing and Artificial Intelligence for Time-Variant Health Data Lab)
details: Developing an open-source software package for analyzing pupillometry data.
Filtering blink artifacts so clinical researchers can evaluate pupil diameter as a biomarker of circadian system health.

title: Research Assistant – Signal Processing (Intern)
details: Writing a software package to parse pupillometry and related data.
Performing signal-processing analyses to filter artifacts from data.
Analyzing and plotting data, preparing output statistics.
Writing documentation and a user-friendly website for non-study staff.
